name: lifescape-engine
description: Quality automation for the Lifescape retirement decision engine

scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css
scripts.quality:frontend: npm run format:check && npm run lint
scripts.quality:python: uv run ruff format --check . && uv run ruff check . && uv run mypy src && npm run test:coverage && uv build
scripts.quality:check: npm run quality:frontend && npm run quality:python
scripts.security:config: eslint src/retirement_engine/static/app.js && if command -v gitleaks >/dev/null 2>&1; then gitleaks detect --config .gitleaks.toml --no-git; else npx --yes create-qa-architect@5.14.0 --security-config --no-eslint-security; fi
scripts.security:check: npm run security:npm && npm run security:python && npm run security:config
